symptoms.symptom_name: Sharply demarcated weeping erythema at the product application site within an hour

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute contact dermatitis of the scalp
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hyper-acute reaction precisely matching the application area is characteristic of contact dermatitis.
Cellulitis develops over days and does not map exactly to a product application area.

symptoms.symptom_name: No facial/airway swelling or breathing difficulty

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of any mucosal/airway swelling makes anaphylaxis/airway angioedema unlikely now.

symptoms.symptom_name: Intact epidermis with vesicles and clear serous weeping (no eschar)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Weeping vesicles with intact epidermis argue against full-thickness coagulative chemical burn.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Clinical diagnosis; retain product for identification
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Diagnosis is clinical; keep the product/packaging to identify the culprit and for patch testing later.
To confirm allergic contact allergen once the acute reaction settles.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bacterial swab if it becomes purulent
